name: Gunvolt Chronicles: Luminous Avenger iX
short_description: Experience the apeX of 2D action! A new era of 2D action begins now! Get ready for high-speed, stylish 2D side-scrolling action like never before. Inti Creates presents the ultimate in classic 2D action with "Luminous Avenger iX"!
detailed_description:
"Get ready for the apeX of 2D action!"

Lock-on shots, wall jumping, hovering, air-dashing.
Use every tool at your disposal to soar through levels and crush the bosses that await you.
Acquire "EX Weapons" from defeated bosses to expand your arsenal!

Experience high-speed, stylish action like never before. Inti Creates presents the ultimate in classic 2D action with "Luminous Avenger iX"!
about_the_game:

Experience high-speed, stylish action like never before. Inti Creates presents the ultimate in classic 2D action with "Luminous Avenger iX"!
supported_languages: English, Japanese, Traditional Chinese, Korean, Thai, Simplified Chinese, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Portugal
